title: Match footer background color to header background color

requirements.text: Update the Footer component's background color to exactly match the background color used by the LandingHeader component, ensuring visual consistency between the two.

quotes: use the same header background color to replace the color for the footer background

acceptanceCriteria: The footer background color is visually identical to the header background color.
The footer's existing content (logo, links, copyright, attribution) remains fully visible and readable against the new background.
No other footer styles (padding, spacing, font sizes) are changed.

constraints: Do not change any other footer styles — only the background color.
Do not modify files listed in frontend.immutablePaths.
nonGoals: Altering footer padding, spacing, or font sizes.
